section.heading: Regulations

content.p: As soon as practicable after the effective date of this subchapter, the Secretary shall promulgate regulations appropriate for its implementation.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 114–289, title VII, § 701, Dec. 16, 2016, 130 Stat. 1493.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: The effective date of this subchapter, referred to in text, probably means the date of enactment of Pub. L. 114–289, which enacted this subchapter and was approved Dec. 16, 2016.
